Title: Trailer: PostgreSQL Like a Pro
Description:
Whether you're building AI agents or managing a mission-critical migration, the PostgreSQL Like a Pro video series is a great place to start. It shows how PostgreSQL on Azure, powered by AMD technologies, simplifies data projects across real-world scenarios.

Each episode focuses on practical concepts, real‑world use cases, and architectural decisions.

Here's what you’ll learn from the pros:
- How to build AI agents that work
- How to migrate without the manual grind
- How to optimize PostgreSQL performance
- How to scale to meet the most demanding workloads

📺 Watch the series: https://www.aka.ms/PostgreLikeAPro 📖 https://www.aka.ms/postgreslikeapro-blog
Author: Microsoft Developer
